heading: Business or trade obligations
label: 4026 Business or trade obligations
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 596 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
Effective DateSection applicable to any case not final before , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 19, 2003section 3 of Pub. L. 108–189section 3901 of this title

children.heading: Availability of non-business assets to satisfy obligations
children.label: a Availability of non-business assets to satisfy obligations
children.text: If the trade or business (without regard to the form in which such trade or business is carried out) of a servicemember has an obligation or liability for which the servicemember is personally liable, the assets of the servicemember not held in connection with the trade or business may not be available for satisfaction of the obligation or liability during the servicemember’s military service.

children.heading: Relief to obligors
children.label: b Relief to obligors
children.text: Upon application to a court by the holder of an obligation or liability covered by this section, relief granted by this section to a servicemember may be modified as justice and equity require.
